creator: rootrider@shellfront.org
text:
I'm upgrading from 2.11.0,1 to 2.11.0_1,1, and the de/install script is failing for pkg.

[1/2] Upgrading amavisd-new from 2.11.0,1 to 2.11.0_1,1...
===> Creating groups.
Creating group 'vscan' with gid '110'.
pw: gid `110' has already been allocated
===> Creating users
Creating user 'vscan' with uid '110'.
pw: uid `110' has already been allocated
install: unknown group vscan
pkg: PRE-INSTALL script failed


# cat /etc/group | grep 110
amavis:*:110:
# cat /etc/passwd | grep 110  
amavis:*:110:110:Scanning Virus Account:/var/amavis:/usr/sbin/nologin

As you can see, I have a custom user and group name for amavisd. This upgrade has worked well up until now. I'm a little confused because I'm not seeing anything in the latest port commits that would affect this.

The upgrade with pkg went fine if I used -I to skip the install script.
